name: worktree
description: Production-ready form management system with visual builder and admin panel

scripts.dev: npx kill-port 3005 5005 1234 && pnpm --filter worktree-frontend run dev & pnpm --filter worktree-backend run dev & pnpm run ws
scripts.build: pnpm --filter worktree-frontend run build && pnpm --filter worktree-backend run build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter worktree-backend run test && pnpm --filter worktree-frontend run test
scripts.test:integration: pnpm --filter worktree-backend run test:integration && pnpm --filter worktree-frontend run test:integration
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm --filter worktree-backend run test:coverage && pnpm --filter worktree-frontend run test:coverage
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter worktree-frontend run lint && pnpm --filter worktree-backend run lint
